scope_note: Deliberately narrow July-29 alpha cut (GH #258): GitHub + Linear production-path connectors plus local_directory and google_drive universal-conformance connectors, proving webhook, active GraphQL polling, passive import, and bounded document fetch through one mandatory redaction + normalization path. Jira is excluded: its live HTTP receiver and REST fetch remain deferred. Conformance state is multi-axis and never collapses into one verified boolean; component proof requires a recorded real capture; only a real Bot delivery receipt proves the gateway axis; terminal Bot and human acceptance belong to Bot #856/#869 and Factory #282.

entries.acquisition_boundary: operator-run HTTPS receiver; connector verifies X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC over the original raw bytes before any parsing
entries.capture_command: python scripts/capture_sanitize.py --connector github --mode webhook --input <raw-delivery.json> --provider-schema-version github-webhooks/2022-11-28 --license-note <note> --out-dir ingest/captures/github-webhook --capture-meta '{"resign_secret": "<capture-secret>", "resign_signature": "sha256=<hmac-over-sanitized-bytes>", "delivery_id": "<X-GitHub-Delivery>"}'
entries.required_credential_class: repository webhook admin (to register the receiver and read the delivery), or repo admin token for the webhook deliveries API
entries.notes: Implementation proven by component tests over fixtures; a REAL signed delivery capture requires an operator-run receiver with a registered webhook. Fixtures deliberately do NOT satisfy real_capture.

entries.acquisition_boundary: live fetch_active REST path is deferred / not wired (connectors/github/README.md); only the parse_pull_request surface exists
entries.authentication_method: would be token-authenticated REST; not wired
entries.capture_command: not available: implement the live fetch_active REST path first (deferred in connectors/github/README.md), then capture with scripts/capture_sanitize.py --connector github --mode active_poll --input <raw-pr.json>
entries.required_credential_class: GitHub token with repo read scope (once the mode is implemented)
entries.notes: Honest gap (GH #258): GitHub active polling/backfill is NOT implemented on main; this entry exists so the missing mode is visible instead of fabricating matrix symmetry.

entries.acquisition_boundary: operator-run HTTPS receiver; connector verifies Linear-Signature HMAC over the original raw bytes plus the 60s webhookTimestamp replay window before parsing
entries.authentication_method: webhook signing secret, HMAC-SHA256 hex (Linear-Signature) + 60s anti-replay window, fail-closed
entries.capture_command: python scripts/capture_sanitize.py --connector linear --mode webhook --input <raw-webhook.json> --provider-schema-version linear-webhooks-2026 --license-note <note> --out-dir ingest/captures/linear-webhook --capture-meta '{"resign_secret": "<capture-secret>", "resign_signature": "<hmac-over-sanitized-bytes>"}'
entries.required_credential_class: Linear workspace admin (webhook creation) for a live delivery to an operator-run receiver
entries.notes: Implementation proven by component tests over fixtures; a REAL signed delivery capture requires workspace-admin webhook registration.

entries.provider_schema_version: linear-graphql issues query (wire-gate fields UNVERIFIED until a live response; connectors/linear/auth.md)
entries.acquisition_boundary: operator-run GraphQL HTTP poll (runtime.graphql_poll); Authorization API-key header; Relay cursor pagination
entries.authentication_method: personal API key in Authorization header
entries.capture_command: LINEAR_API_KEY=<key> python scripts/linear_live_wire.py --capture-out ingest/captures/linear-graphql_poll/raw.json && python scripts/capture_sanitize.py --connector linear --mode graphql_poll --input ingest/captures/linear-graphql_poll/raw.json --provider-schema-version linear-graphql-2026 --license-note <note> --out-dir ingest/captures/linear-graphql_poll
entries.notes: Poll parse path is code-complete and harness-proven against fixtures; the exact live field set / orderBy / pagination behavior stays UNVERIFIED (auth.md wire-gate) until scripts/linear_live_wire.py records a live sanitized response.

entries.acquisition_boundary: operator-run local directory scan reading real files from disk; scope-checked against the recorded scan root
entries.notes: Real capture recorded from this repository's own CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md through a genuine operator-run file read (the connector's actual passive-import boundary); the enforcement email was redacted (pii:1) with structural proof in the ledger.

real_capture.source_license_or_retention_note: MIT (this repository's own committed file); retention: sanitized recording only, original digest retained

entries.acquisition_boundary: operator-run bounded documents.get fetch for one URL-routed documentId; live Docs API call and OAuth refresh stay operator-run
entries.authentication_method: OAuth 2.0 bearer token (operator-resolved; refresh-token flow per LD5)
entries.capture_command: python scripts/capture_sanitize.py --connector google_drive --mode document_fetch --input <raw-documents-get.json> --provider-schema-version google-docs-api-v1 --license-note <note> --out-dir ingest/captures/google_drive-document_fetch --capture-meta '{"source_url": "<docs.google.com document URL>", "authenticated": true}'
entries.required_credential_class: Google OAuth client + consented Drive/Docs read scope for the target document
entries.notes: Bounded fetch parse surface implemented and component-tested over fixtures; a REAL capture requires operator OAuth consent.
